# GraphMindset

> Lightning-payable, L402-metered knowledge graph platform for exploring, building, and curating connected knowledge. Search nodes, discover content via a social-style feed, manage your ontology, and pay for API access with Bitcoin Lightning (Sphinx or WebLN).

## Features

- Feed-style discovery: browsable cards with thumbnails, type chips, and social metrics
- Search with exact, fuzzy, and semantic matching
- 3D radial graph viewport with camera navigation and bloom post-processing
- Ontology/schema editor with 2D DAG view and toggleable 3D WebGL visualization
- Content sources: Twitter/X, YouTube, RSS, GitHub, web pages, and documents
- My Content panel — personal contribution history with status badges, delete, and admin deep-links
- In-app audio/video player (persistent, floating overlay, fullscreen)
- Node deep-link sharing via `?id=` query parameter

## Lightning & L402

- Top up sats balance via Sphinx wallet or WebLN/Alby browser extension
- Pay-per-call L402-metered endpoints (search, content creation, node unlocks)
- Boost nodes with keysend payments; boost counter recorded on the graph
- Transaction history showing searches, boosts, top-ups, and content adds
- Export/import L402 token for backup and cross-device restore
- Content-creator payouts: contributors earn sats when their nodes are unlocked

## Admin

- Content sources management (subscribe/delete external sources)
- Radar & janitor scheduling (cron config, immediate-trigger, run history)
- Content review & moderation (approve/dismiss AI-generated graph suggestions)
- Graph settings & domain visibility (name, description, node-type/domain-root toggles)

## Authentication

- Sphinx app bridge (postMessage WebView)
- WebLN browser extension fallback
- Anonymous L402-only mode (no Lightning identity required)
